required_coverage: P00 frozen red signature and test result
explicit sanitized copy authorization and userData rejection
Node database audit and GoDataClient owner guard
daemon readiness, process/handle cleanup and single writer
maintenance lock, first Go write, backup restore and fault injection
near-real scale schema rows, table hashes and runtime compatibility
forbidden_content: secrets, tokens, credentials, cookies or sessions
raw user data or database rows
real userData or production database paths
unauthorized absolute paths and file URLs
remaining_stage_risk: P15 owns formal disposition of the exact P00 check red signature; no P09 verifier may hide, rename, skip or swallow it.
